description: RSS / Atom / Substack feeds SCOUT polls every 4 hours. Each entry: vendor slug (matches Supabase tools.slug if applicable), feed URL, type, and the categorization hints SCOUT uses when deciding opportunity_score.
_notes: Populate the rest of the 50+ vendors before flipping SCOUT to production.
If a vendor only offers email digest (no RSS), set type='email' and route through a Beehiiv-ingestion alias.
tracked=false rows are kept for reference but SCOUT skips polling.
